body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends! Happy Thursday!

So, I ended up in a scenario yesterday where I didn’t leave the house, which meant I never put makeup on, which delayed yesterday’s photo. I really should be dashing this evening, so ya’ll should for real this time get another study in pink and black. 😏 (Followers seemed to have slowed down, so it seems less likely that you’ll get the “enhanced” shots anytime soon. 😞)

I’ll see if I can tame my brat of a muse for another story today. Hopefully it’s a little shorter than Tuesday’s. Apparently that one’s long enough where if I try to paste it into Discord, it thinks it’s a text file. 😮

Have a wonderful day and stay your super sexy selves and I’ll see you all in the Tumblrverse! 🖤🖤🖤
